title: [phase:simulate] [family:canary-migration] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: openclaw-tmux replacement. Simulate a canary-ready migration path from openclaw-tmux to the wrapper prototype. Return concise bullets: first canary workflow, stop conditions, rollback triggers, manifest/doc migration orde...
summary_text: - Remaining completion bar is still the documented `runtime-ready` gate, not `contract-ready`: on the target self-hosted runner, prove `nlm` on `PATH`, authenticated runner user, `FUGUE_NOTEBOOKLM_RUNTIME_ENABLED=true`, and a passing live gate with both `NOTEBOOKLM_READINESS_LIVE_SMOKE_MODE=required` and `NOTEBOOKLM_READINESS_EXECUTE_LIVE_MODE=required` ([notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:45](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:45), [notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:48](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:48), [notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:54](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:54)). - Completion also still requires the full original done criteria: deterministic E2E for both `notebooklm-visual-brief` and `notebooklm-slide-prep`, strict label contract, stable preflight states, bounded evidence handoff into `codex-execute-validate.sh`, and no transcript/report-body injection ([kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md:244](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md:244), [kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md:246](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md:246), [kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md:257](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md:257), [kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md:267](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md:267)). - Dispatching `notebooklm-runtime-smoke` can be insufficient because the runtime job is conditional and may be skipped when NotebookLM hints are not derived from the issue ([notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:50](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:50), [notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:138](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:138)). - Even when dispatched and executed, that workflow sets `NOTEBOOKLM_READINESS_SKIP_REPO_TESTS=true`, so it does not run the repo-test portion of the readiness gate; it validates live capability but not the full local test bundle by itself ([notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:82](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:82), [check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh:115](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh:115)). - Current repo record explicitly says still not yet verified for live authenticated `nlm` execution history, runner auth/secret lifecycle behavior, and production-like privacy review; until that evidence exists, status remains fail-closed at `contract-ready` ([notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:10](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:10), [notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:67](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:67), [notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:75](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:75)).
